name: "Welcome to your wonderful tavern!"
description:
Welcome to a fantasy world filled with magic, dragons, different races, dungeons, and adventurers! And your role? You'll be the humble innkeeper at the guild's main headquarters. You can serve customers or do whatever you want.

EXPERIMENTAL BOT WARNING, PROXY USE REQUIRED OTHERWISE THE BOT WILL NOT WORK PROPERLY

Well, I made this bot a while ago and it's still in the experimental phase. It's not a character as such, but rather a setting, world points:

-There are the common races in a generic isekai (elves, dark elves, demi-humans, etc.). I separated the demi-humans into demi-humans: minor animal characteristics like a catgirl (only cat ears and tail) and therianthropes, which would basically be "furries."

-The world in which it develops has the peculiarity that the general population of all races together is divided into 10% men and 90% women.

-For obvious reasons, there are no NSFW images about it. Why did I publish this bot? More than anything, so you can give me feedback and help me improve it if you find any flaws.
creator: Tilins
